issues.sample: WHILE PULLING OUT FROM STOP SIGN ON TWO OCCASIONS THE VEHICLE LOST DRIVE POWER. A WRENCH APPEARED ON THE DASHBOARD THAT SAID SERVICE. HAD I HAD TO GET OUT OF THE WAY OF AN APPROACHING VEHICLE I WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN AND THIS ISSUE COULD HAVE RESULTED IN A CRASH RESULTING IN INJURY

narrative.headline: What 2015 Ford Focus owners report most
narrative.summary: The dominant pattern in owner complaints is sudden, unexpected loss of drive power, most often reported during low-speed maneuvers such as pulling away from a stop. A dashboard warning indicator — described as a wrench icon with a service message — commonly accompanies these power-loss events, and owners note that the situation creates a safety exposure when traffic is present. Steering and fuel/propulsion complaints round out the picture, with some incidents involving crashes or fires.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle suddenly losing drive power while pulling away from a stop, accompanied by a wrench warning on the dashboard indicating a service condition. · 11 crash · 6 injured

issues.sample: WHILE PULLING OUT FROM STOP SIGN ON TWO OCCASIONS THE VEHICLE LOST DRIVE POWER. A WRENCH APPEARED ON THE DASHBOARD THAT SAID SERVICE. HAD I HAD TO GET OUT OF THE WAY OF AN APPROACHING VEHICLE I WOULD NOT HAVE BEEN AND THIS ISSUE COULD HAVE RESULTED IN A CRASH RESULTING IN INJURY
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report sudden loss of drive power during low-speed departure from a stop, with a dashboard wrench and service alert appearing at the time of the event. · 2 fire · 2 crash · 4 injured

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report concerns about the vehicle's condition and readiness, with some complaints arising in rental or shared-use contexts where the vehicle's state was not as expected. · 1 fire

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report alarming steering experiences, with at least one account describing a frightening event that prompted an initial complaint filing, noted in connection with an electric variant. · 2 crash
